name: @kortix/tunnel
description: Kortix Tunnel — local agent CLI that bridges your machine to Kortix cloud sandboxes

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target node --minify && node -e "const f=require('fs');let c=f.readFileSync('dist/cli.js','utf8');c=c.replace('#!/usr/bin/env bun','#!/usr/bin/env node').replace('// @bun\n','');f.writeFileSync('dist/cli.js',c)"

author: Kortix AI
